form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after five months 9th of 12 at this track on March 8 over 1400m, in the wet; 18 len behind Bonsai Bob carrying 60kg at $6.30. Previously second-up 4th of 9 at this track Rating 65 on April 21 over 1400m, on rain affected going; 7 len behind Freddie Time with 56kg at $19.40. Will come on from that run and is among the better hopes.

form.formComment: Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of ten weeks. Finished off last preparation 16th of 18 at Riccarton Park January 24 over 1800m, in the wet; 20 len behind Flamboyance carrying 57.5kg at $14.60. Previous preparation first-up won by neck Phar Lap Racecourse October 9 over 1200m slow track defeating Fawke Lightning with 58.5kg at $14. Looks a key runner.
